race.comment: SAINTLY SANDS (5) rewarded for her consistency with a slashing 5 len victory from last on the bend over 1600m at Warren. On the quick back-up and will relish the 4kg claim again. OCEAN TSUNAMI (4) talented filly back in grade and finally drawn a decent barrier. Taken back from the outside barrier and failed to make an impression when thirteenth over 1500m at Rosehill in Highway grade. Rates highly from the gate and expected to go close. CROWN LEGEND (8) ran below expectations when up in class and trip with a poor ninth over 2000m at Mudgee in BM66 company. Each way player. AUTUMN HEIR (6) deep into the prep and will find this easier after running fifth at Newcastle on a heavy track in BM68 grade.
